name: marp-slide-studio
description: Build sophisticated Marp presentations with AI — 65 themes grounded in real brand design systems, Gothic (sans-serif) typography by default for Korean business/tech contexts, multilingual CJK + Latin support (Korean, Japanese, Chinese, English), Playwright-powered visual review loop. Ships with an autopilot that runs brief → theme → compose → refine → export from a single command. Editorial serif variants available via --typography editorial.
